recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Law
recommendations.overview: Dan Saxon is an undercover cop who infiltrates a biker gang to nail the scum behind a drug-smuggling operation. In order to maintain the trust of the gang's leader, he must commit ever more dangerous and heinous crimes. Just how far 'beyond the law'

recommendations.title: Furioza
recommendations.overview: A policewoman makes her ex-boyfriend an offer he can't refuse: either he infiltrates and informs on a gang of hooligans, or his brother goes to jail.

recommendations.title: Extreme Ops
recommendations.overview: While filming an advertisement, some extreme sports enthusiasts unwittingly stop a group of terrorists.

recommendations.title: Ballistic: Ecks vs. Sever
recommendations.overview: Jeremiah Ecks, an FBI agent, realizes that he must join with his lifelong enemy, Agent Sever, a rogue DIA agent with whom he is in mortal combat, in order to defeat a common enemy. That enemy has developed a "micro-device" that can be injected into v

recommendations.title: AKA
recommendations.overview: A steely special ops agent finds his morality put to the test when he infiltrates a crime syndicate and unexpectedly bonds with the boss' young son.

recommendations.title: The Fast and the Furious
recommendations.overview: Dominic Toretto is a Los Angeles street racer suspected of masterminding a series of big-rig hijackings. When undercover cop Brian O'Conner infiltrates Toretto's iconoclastic crew, he falls for Toretto's sister and must choose a side: the gang or the

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: Agneepath
recommendations.overview: When his father is lynched by a mob after being framed by a gangster, a young boy leaves his village along with his pregnant mother  and flees to Mumbai. He takes up a life of crime and swears to avenge his father. A remake of the 1990 film.

recommendations.title: Weekend in Taipei
recommendations.overview: A former DEA agent and a former undercover operative revisit their romance during a fateful weekend in Taipei, unaware of the dangerous consequences of their past.
